{{Quote|Dagobah Mud Cake! With junk beetles!|Unidentified green bounty hunter|<ref name="vq">[[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest'' 1]]</ref>}}
A '''green-skinned satyr-like alien''' worked as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
This [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] was part of a bounty hunter group on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. When the name of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who destroyed the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] was revealed, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] and his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] killed the hunter and every other individual who heard it.

==Personality and traits==
The bounty hunter had green skin with brown fur on their legs.

==Behind the scenes==
This unidentified individual was created by ''Star Wars'' artist [[Dave Gibbons]] for [[Vader's Quest 1]] of the [[Star Wars: Vader's Quest|''Vader's Quest'']] series of comics, published in [[1999]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

This bounty hunter's species was not specified in the comic book, nor his species' homeworld, but he shares traits exhibited by both [[half-Bothan]]s such as [[Lirondo]] and [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronians]] such as [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]].
